_note: Durable QUESTIONS, not answers. Re-derived at session start against the current repo. Answers rot; questions self-heal. Re-derivation results are recorded in context/rederive_log.jsonl (kind=rederive), never here. Question text is human-owned: agents do not add, edit, or retire questions.

questions.q: What is the current deployment target and which file or config pins it?
questions.evidence_hint: deploy config in repo root / CI workflow files

questions.q: What is the test command and does it actually run green right now?
questions.evidence_hint: package manifest scripts / CI config; run it, do not trust the last claim

questions.q: What is the single most load-bearing module and what is its public contract?
questions.evidence_hint: imports graph / the module everything else calls into

questions.q: What did the last session claim was done, and is there externally-produced evidence for it?
questions.evidence_hint: handoff doc 'Done' section vs tests, diffs, CI output

questions.q: What open thread from a prior session is still unresolved?
questions.evidence_hint: handoff doc 'Open threads' section / issue tracker

questions.q: What invariant, if broken silently, would hurt real users?
questions.evidence_hint: data integrity, auth boundaries, money paths, irreversible writes

questions.q: Where does the project currently lie to itself - where do the recorded notes disagree with repo reality?
questions.evidence_hint: diff handoff/README claims against the actual code and test output

questions.q: Which written-down rule has the agent violated recently despite it being written down?
questions.evidence_hint: project instructions file vs recent session behavior / recent diffs

questions.q: Is any always-loaded context file over its size budget?
questions.evidence_hint: line counts of the instructions and handoff files vs their declared caps

questions.q: Has the model or harness changed since last session, and did any apparatus go stale because of it?
questions.evidence_hint: model id vs the one recorded in the last rederive entry; harness changelog

questions.q: What is the riskiest irreversible action likely this session, and does it need owner sign-off?
questions.evidence_hint: planned work touching migrations, deletions, deploys, external publishing

questions.q: Which part of the context system is earning its keep, and which part is pure tax?
questions.evidence_hint: which recorded artifacts were actually read or acted on in recent sessions
